research_basis: 2025/26 retrospective architecture ceilings show the 1X2-only projection improves or preserves every frozen point metric under both opening-average and closing-average market references. The 1X2+OU2.5 profile passes at closing but reduces exact-score Top1 at opening, so it is not authorized for arbitrary question-time shadow use.
promotion_rule: Shadow only. Single-provider snapshots are diagnostic; promotion-readiness requires synchronized independent-provider consensus. 2025/26 may not be reused for tuning or promotion. Formal promotion requires untouched future PIT chronological validation and a later CURRENT-authorized promotion receipt.
